summary: End-to-end Android APK red-team pipeline — automated APK acquisition (Play Store + apkpure + apkmirror fallback), jadx decompilation, secret/URL/JWT/Firebase grep, pinned-cert extraction, exported-com
preconditions: Skill apk-redteam-pipeline has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching apk-redteam-pipeline
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
